# JoinMarket wire message fixtures
# Format: one message per line (newline-terminated as on the wire)
!getpeers
!ping
!pong
!ann absorder J5testMakerOOOOO sw0 minsize=27300 maxsize=7142857 ordertype=sw0 cjfee_a=2100 cjfee_r=0.0002 txfee=0 mixdepth=0 available_balance=100000000
!fill J5testMakerOOOOO 1000000 abc123
!disconnect
